item.title: A Small Twist Change, Big Difference
item.description: One small change in the twist makes the whole piece land differently. A simple blacksmithing detail with a satisfying result.

media:content.media:title: A Small Twist Change, Big Difference
media:content.media:description: One small change in the twist makes the whole piece land differently. A simple blacksmithing detail with a satisfying result.

item.title: A Small Tweak in the Forge
item.description: A small tweak in the forge turns spring steel into something useful.

media:content.media:title: A Small Tweak in the Forge
media:content.media:description: A small tweak in the forge turns spring steel into something useful.

item.title: Metal Shifts in the Fire
item.description: Watch the metal shift in the fire and hear the shop problem disappear.

media:content.media:title: Metal Shifts in the Fire
media:content.media:description: Watch the metal shift in the fire and hear the shop problem disappear.

item.title: Smart Vise Setup for Smoother Work
item.description: A small fixture change can make every job smoother in the shop. A practical vise setup tip for blacksmithing and metalworking.

media:content.media:title: Smart Vise Setup for Smoother Work
media:content.media:description: A small fixture change can make every job smoother in the shop. A practical vise setup tip for blacksmithing and metalworking.

item.title: Old-Shop Finish in Forging
item.description: A forged cable axe with a finish that has that old-shop feel you can’t fake.

media:content.media:title: Old-Shop Finish in Forging
media:content.media:description: A forged cable axe with a finish that has that old-shop feel you can’t fake.

item.title: The Pineapple Twist in Final Shape
item.description: A blacksmithing piece where the final shape really shines, with metalworking and forging focused on the finishing twist.

media:content.media:title: The Pineapple Twist in Final Shape
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing piece where the final shape really shines, with metalworking and forging focused on the finishing twist.

item.title: A Simple Build That Smarts Up the Shop
item.description: A simple build with a result that makes the whole shop smarter. Blacksmithing, metalworking, and fabrication in a practical shop project.

media:content.media:title: A Simple Build That Smarts Up the Shop
media:content.media:description: A simple build with a result that makes the whole shop smarter. Blacksmithing, metalworking, and fabrication in a practical shop project.

item.title: A Forged Knot Settles Into Place
item.description: Watch the steel settle into place at the very end in this blacksmithing and metalworking moment.

media:content.media:title: A Forged Knot Settles Into Place
media:content.media:description: Watch the steel settle into place at the very end in this blacksmithing and metalworking moment.
